target: 18. Searching for the Woman in Glasses

(He continued to search the Kobayakawa house after that,
But of course, he couldn't find anyone's silhouette
At all)

(After Shiomi-san called the police station,
I left the Kobayakawa house)
(The events that occurred at the Kobayakawa house couldn't be changed)
(If I did nothing and let the day pass like this…)

(The woman I shared the ferry with will also
Be killed in the same way…)

(That person…
Was trying to tell me something right before dying)
(She knows something…)
(Perhaps I can still save her now)
(This time, I haven't met her yet)

(I woke up at the harbor, and
The flow after that
Had changed from before)

(After getting off the ferry,
Where did that person go?
How can I track her steps…)
Check the inns
Do some inquiries

(That amount of luggage…
It's not like a day-trip tourist)
(Alright, I'll check the inns)

(I visited the four inns on the island.
Anminka, Nakamura, Tomaura, Uozumi…)

(And I got information from Nakamura-san,
The owner of the guesthouse Nakamura)
(A man in a suit… long black hair, wearing glasses…)

"Hey~!"
"Nowadays, we get a lot of guests every day!"
Are there any other more obvious features?
Hmm… besides that…

That person was super…!
U-um… how do I say… she's big!

Big…?
Ah, that person! They were here!
Surely they came to our place!
(Oh, did I get through…?)

But she wasn't a guest.
She came around yesterday evening… to the
cafe…!
Would you like to come to the cafe too, Shinpei?
(I see, I remember now…)

(The first one who died on July 23rd.
Nakamura-san at Kofune said something strange…)
When we met this morning, she said it!!

Here!!
Looking for a woman with glasses and big breasts!!
What?!

Was that really me?
You're drinking too much, Nakamura-san!

(At the funeral home, I was copied by
the shadow of Shiori-chan)

(The next day, it turns out that the copy of me
was looking for that woman)

(My shadow is also trying to find out
her movements…)

(It seems that person
Possesses some kind of key)

(But in the end, that woman didn't stay
anywhere on the island)
(I don't even know her name…)
(Is it the limit…? With just my own power…)

(Let's do some inquiries first.
Surely, someone must have seen her somewhere)

(I visited cafes, the lighthouse, and the Hitogashima Shrine,
And did some inquiries)

(And I obtained one eyewitness account.
I saw her walking towards the residential area last night)

(That person wasn't a tourist,
Maybe she was a relative of an islander)
(But I couldn't get any more information)

(Not only couldn't I track her steps,
I don't even know her name…)
(Is it the limit…? With just my own power…)
